{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323041846BCA926B6BFE9CA7A56F2"}"},"total":10},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7225878083092890380","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉挺好看的，环境的氛围写的很棒，主角团之间的对话也很真实，就是对话有水字数的嫌疑。还有想问一下主角和范老师的名字是不是来自黑白无常，谢（必）安和范（无咎），可以透露一下他们前世到底是啥关系不","text_exts":[{"e":66,"s":62,"text":"黑白无常","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%BB%91%E7%99%BD%E6%97%A0%E5%B8%B8&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774210726CA7A56F2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227225878083092890380%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227137982032881126412%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%BB%91%E7%99%BD%E6%97%A0%E5%B8%B8%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1682405959,"group_id":"7137982032881126412","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyzmP8FJdav0U6jTlnpG5j0veG5MUXpSK9dM/mlyEjhV","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"1125494453185039","user_name":"拿雨伞当蘑菇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1125494453185039","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7137982032881126412","book_info":{"abstract":"【悬疑脑洞+搞笑+无女主+慢节奏+无厘头】
这个世间有很多不可告人的秘密，而每个人的脸上都戴着一幅看不见的面具。
当你准备揭开它时，其实你已经离死不远了。
身患绝症的少年被迫卷入一场惊天阴谋，作为棋子的他不得不想尽办法在一个接着一个怪力乱神的灵异事件中存活下来。
只是遇到的敌人有“亿”点离谱……
